2605.07748.title: TextLDM: Language Modeling with Continuous Latent Diffusion
2605.07748.paper_summary: Diffusion Transformers (DiT) trained with flow matching in a VAE latent space have unified visual generation across images and videos. A natural next step toward a single architecture for both generation (visual synthesis) and understanding (text generation) is to apply this framework to language modeling. We propose TextLDM, which transfers the visual latent diffusion recipe to text generation with minimal architectural modification. A Transformer-based VAE maps discrete tokens to continuous latents, enhanced by Representation Alignment (REPA) with a frozen pretrained language model to produce representations effective for conditional denoising. A standard DiT then performs flow matching in this latent space, identical in architecture to its visual counterpart. The central challenge we address is obtaining high-quality continuous text representations: we find that reconstruction fidelity alone is insufficient, and that aligning latent features with a pretrained language model via REPA is critical for downstream generation quality. Trained from scratch on OpenWebText2, TextLDM substantially outperforms prior diffusion language models and matches GPT-2 under the same settings. Our results establish that the visual DiT recipe transfers effectively to language, taking a concrete step toward unified diffusion architectures for multimodal generation and understanding.
2605.07748.paper_summary_zh: 擴散Transformer（DiT）在變分自編碼器（VAE）潛在空間中使用流匹配訓練，實現了圖像和視頻之間的統一視覺生成。朝著一個單一架構進一步發展，以實現生成（視覺合成）和理解（文本生成）的自然下一步是將這一框架應用於語言建模。我們提出了TextLDM，該模型在最小架構修改的情況下，將視覺潛在擴散方法轉移到文本生成中。一個基於Transformer的VAE將離散標記映射到連續潛在空間，並通過與凍結的預訓練語言模型的表示對齊（REPA）進行增強，以生成對條件去噪有效的表示。標準的DiT然後在這個潛在空間中執行流匹配，其架構與其視覺對應物相同。我們所面臨的核心挑戰是獲得高質量的連續文本表示：我們發現僅僅重建保真度是不夠的，通過REPA將潛在特徵與預訓練語言模型對齊對下游生成質量至關重要。在OpenWebText2上從零開始訓練，TextLDM顯著超越了先前的擴散語言模型，並在相同設置下與GPT-2相匹配。我們的結果證明，視覺DiT方法有效地轉移到語言上，朝著多模態生成和理解的統一擴散架構邁出了具體的一步。
2605.07748.author: Jiaxiu Jiang et.al.
2605.07748.authors: Jiaxiu Jiang, Jingjing Ren, Wenbo Li, Bo Wang, Haoze Sun, Yijun Yang, Jianhui Liu, Yanbing Zhang, Shenghe Zheng, Yuan Zhang, Haoyang Huang, Nan Duan, Wangmeng Zuo
